title: Doro Wat
instructions: Add eggs and serve with injera.

reviews.text: Incredible! Added a splash of lemon juice and a pinch of cardamom. Also added a dash of berbere and topped with fresh cilantro.
Used extra berbere for more heat. Added a splash of water and a pinch of salt. Served with extra injera.
Perfect recipe! Followed it exactly and turned out great. Will make again.
Really good recipe. My family loved it. Simple to follow.
It was okay. Nothing special but edible. Might make again with changes.
Didn't work for me. Flavor was off and texture was wrong.
